title: The future of AI isn't one genius model—it's teams of specialized agents working together 🤝 That's why I'm so excited about multi-agent systems!
snippet: Fetch.ai (@Fetch_ai): The future of AI isn't one genius model—it's teams of specialized agents working together 🤝 That's why I'm so excited about multi-agent systems! Who else is seeing massive potential in collaborative AI? 👇 #CollaborativeAI #MultiAgentSystems #AITeams #FutureOfWork
